summary: Guro's DPK hold (이인영 55.74) reflects a progressive industrial base, the Guro Digital Complex tech-worker cluster, and a significant foreign-resident population (Joseon-jok Chinese-Korean community around Daerim). Consistent DPK across subdistricts.

issues.label: Industrial / tech-worker base
issues.description: Guro Digital Complex anchors progressive-leaning young-professional cluster; 구로공단 legacy.

issues.label: Multicultural composition
issues.description: Daerim-dong's Joseon-jok community and multicultural area around Nambusunhwan.
